content.text:
All done. Here's what was changed:

- **`src/errors.js`** (new) — `AppError extends Error` with `.name === 'AppError'`, `.code`, and `.message` (human text only)
- **9 modules** (`validate`, `parse`, `money`, `range`, `store`, `auth`, `format`, `calc`, `dates`) — each now imports `AppError` and throws `new AppError('CODE', 'human text')` instead of `new Error('CODE: human text')`
- **`src/index.js`** — `...require('./errors.js')` added as the first spread, re-exporting `AppError` alongside all existing exports

No `new Error(` calls remain anywhere in `src/` — confirmed by grep. VERIFIED.

- **`src/index.js`** — `...require('./errors.js')` added as the first spread, re-exporting `AppError` alongside all existing exports
